titleStmt.title: SII 20.117: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 117. (B.K. No. 5 of 1935-36.) LAKSHMĒŚVAR, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the wall in the backyard of the Taluk Office.

summary.p: The record is dated in the king's regnal year 10, Prabhava, Ashāḍha śu, 12 Thursday, Dakshiṇāyana-saṅkramaṇa. śu. 12 seems to be a mistake for ba. 12 because the said saṅkramaṇa occurred on the latter day. Then the date of the record would regularly correspond to Thursday, 26th June, A.D. 1147.

The inscription registers certain gifts of lands in Kunduravaḷḷi and Huligeṟe made by Daṇḍanāyaka Mēcharasa when Daṇḍanāyaka Kēsimayya was governing Belvola-300, Huligeṟe-300, Halasige-12,000 and Hānungal-500 and when Jayakēśidēva of the Maṇala family was the manneya of Huligeṟe-nāḍu.
The record was composed by Karnnāṭasukavi Mukhya-paṇḍita and engraved by Chāvōja, the eldest son of Jinnōja of Puligeṟe.
Published in Ep. Ind., Vol. XVI, p. 44.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: Digital edition of SII 20.117 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
